name: Nagano Tokyu Department Store Co., Ltd.
summary: Nagano Tokyu Department Store Co., Ltd. engages in the department stores business in Japan. The company was formerly known as Nagano Maruzen Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nagano Tokyu Department Store Co., Ltd. in September 1970. The company was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Nagano, Japan. Nagano Tokyu Department Store Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of TOKYU DEPARTMENT STORE CO.,LTD.
